Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI

Class LobbyGUIController

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GUIController
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.LobbyGUIController
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class LobbyGUIController extends GUIController implements javafx.fxml.Initializable
The controller of the scene where you have to choose between creating a new game or joining an old one

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL url, ResourceBundle resourceBundle)
      Initializes the table columns and refreshes the list of games.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable
      Parameters:
      url - the location used to resolve relative paths for the root object, or null if not known
      resourceBundle - the resources for the root object, or null if there are no resources

    • showGames

      public void showGames(HashMap<Integer,Integer> gameList)
      Displays the list of games in the TableView. Clears the existing items in the TableView and populates it with the games provided in the given HashMap. Each game entry is represented by its ID in the table. Allows the user to click on a game ID to send a join request, provided a valid nickname is entered in the nickname field. If the nickname is not valid, it notifies the user.
      Parameters:
      gameList - a HashMap containing game IDs mapped to the number of players in each game

    • refreshGames

      public void refreshGames()
      Refreshes the list of games by requesting an updated game list from the server.

    • sendJoinRequest

      public void sendJoinRequest(int gameId) throws IOException
      Sends a join request to the server for a specific game. Constructs a JoinGameMessage containing the client's ID, nickname, and the ID of the game to join, then sends this message to the server using the client's connection.
      Parameters:
      gameId - the ID of the game to join
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while sending the join request message
